content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 19, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 19, 2026, focused on stabilizing the Eliza Cloud infrastructure following the Neon-to-Railway migration. Key achievements include decommissioning BitRouter, implementing robust connection pooling for Postgres, and finalizing the cloud-to-app apex cutover. Significant progress was made in agent provisioning reliability, mobile build stability, and documentation accuracy across the framework.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & Routing**
*   Decommissioned BitRouter, transitioning the Cloudflare Worker to act as the primary model gateway ([#8741](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8741), [#8738](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8738)).
*   Implemented round-robin load balancing for Cerebras API keys to mitigate rate-limiting issues ([#8735](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8735)).
*   Added Cloudflare KV cache support to improve Worker reliability ([#8665](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8665)).
*   Hardened provisioning workflows with atomic failure write-backs and improved self-healing for disconnected agents ([#8688](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8688), [#8715](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8715)).

**Agent Orchestration & Performance**
*   Introduced `LEAN_CHAT_PLUGINS` to reduce cold-boot times for dedicated conversational agents ([#8730](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8730)).
*   Enabled sub-agent nesting, MCP auto-inheritance, and inline diff reviews for orchestrator parity ([#8740](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8740)).
*   Optimized background tasks to prevent chat reply blocking, significantly reducing latency ([#8705](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8705)).
*   Replaced TensorFlow.js with a native ggml YOLOv8n detector in the vision plugin to resolve build warnings ([#8725](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8725)).

**UI/UX & Mobile Stability**
*   Streamlined the first-run experience by auto-skipping runtime pickers on cloud-only hosts ([#8742](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8742), [#8753](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8753)).
*   Implemented a new sign-in agent picker and added start/stop controls to the cloud agent manager ([#8721](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8721), [#8662](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8662)).
*   Resolved mobile build regressions by ensuring web-only cloud dashboards are excluded from Capacitor builds ([#8681](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8681)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#8751](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8751): Re-attach app-deploy contract at sub-agent spawn.
*   [#8750](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8750): Fix orchestrator narration for missing ACP methods.
*   [#8749](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8749): Bound redundant planner loops.
*   [#8747](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8747): Dependency updates for uv group.
*   [#8746](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8746): Resolve model names for env-configured backends.
*   [#8745](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8745): SSRF protection for empty addresses.
*   [#8744](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8744): Honor memory limits in embedding branch.
*   [#8743](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8743): Preserve tool-call content in transcripts.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Scaling & Infrastructure**
*   Addressed database connection exhaustion with tunable pools and resolved the Neon-to-Railway migration gaps ([#8696](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8696), [#8321](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8321)).
*   Resolved billing leaks, including container stop-on-suspend and atomic credit decrements ([#8342](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8342)).

**Mobile & Platform Stability**
*   Fixed Android build regressions where web assets were missing from APKs ([#8387](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8387)).
*   Addressed pre-launch gaps including iOS bundle IDs and onboarding tours ([#8652](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8652)).

**Agent Functionality**
*   Fixed issues where VIEWS actions hijacked text-connector turns ([#8613](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8613)).
*   Closed the dedicated-agent tracker following successful auth-unification ([#8621](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8621)).

## NEW ISSUES
*   None reported for this date.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#8621](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8621) Mobile/desktop cloud agents:** Discussions confirmed the auth-unification design is complete. The team is now focused on pointing the app at the unified proxy and repointing the provisioning worker's KV store.
*   **[#8696](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8696) Scale (DB connection architecture):** Mitigation via connection pooling is live. Future work involves implementing PgBouncer/Supavisor and sharding databases per agent, which is currently tracked as infra/operator work.
*   **[#8321](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8321) Eliza Cloud Apps scaling:** The audit is complete. Additive code changes are merged, while multi-node infrastructure and autoscaling remain on the data-plane roadmap.
